2604.17429.title: Jupiter-N Technical Report
2604.17429.paper_summary: We present Jupiter-N, a hybrid reasoning model post-trained from Nemotron 3 Super, a fully open-source 120 billion parameter LLM. We target three objectives: (1) agentic capability via uncertainty-curated trajectories; (2) UK cultural alignment via synthetic data grounded in cultural norms; and (3) Welsh language support via parallel corpora and LLM-translated Welsh conversations. Our data curation strategy carefully preserves the base model's capabilities: using our Forget-Me-Not framework, we mix on-policy synthetic replay with off-policy task data to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, and include a mixture of reasoning and non-reasoning traces to maintain Nemotron's hybrid reasoning ability. Jupiter-N achieves standout gains over Nemotron in Welsh (+18 on ARC-Easy, +5.25 on MMLU-Lite), terminal-use (+9.1 on Terminal Bench 2) and instruction following (+4.4 on IFBench), while retaining the base model capabilities. We frame this work as a reproducible template for sovereign post-training: substituting cultural knowledge, institutional corpora, and target languages produces an equivalent pipeline for any country. All model weights and all post-training datasets are publicly released under open licences.
2604.17429.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹Jupiter-N，這是一個從Nemotron 3 Super後訓練的混合推理模型，該模型是一個完全開源的1200億參數LLM。我們的目標有三個：(1) 通過不確定性策劃的軌跡實現代理能力；(2) 通過基於文化規範的合成數據實現英國文化對齊；以及(3) 通過平行語料庫和LLM翻譯的威爾士語對話提供威爾士語支持。我們的數據策劃策略仔細保留了基礎模型的能力：使用我們的Forget-Me-Not框架，我們將政策內的合成重播與政策外的任務數據混合，以減輕災難性遺忘，並包括推理和非推理痕跡的混合，以維持Nemotron的混合推理能力。Jupiter-N在威爾士語上相較於Nemotron取得了顯著的增長（ARC-Easy上+18，MMLU-Lite上+5.25），終端使用（Terminal Bench 2上+9.1）和指令遵循（IFBench上+4.4），同時保留了基礎模型的能力。我們將這項工作框架化為一個可重複的主權後訓練模板：替換文化知識、機構語料庫和目標語言可以為任何國家生成等效的管道。所有模型權重和所有後訓練數據集均在公開許可下釋放。
2604.17429.author: George Drayson et.al.
